description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal appears on screen
frame_description: A modal overlay titled 'Filter Opportunities' appears over the Explore page content.

description: User examines the filter options in the modal
frame_description: The user pauses to read the various filter categories like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate.

description: User selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter
frame_description: The 'Under 10 min' button is highlighted blue upon selection.

description: User selects the '10-30 min' duration filter
frame_description: The '10-30 min' button is highlighted blue upon selection.

description: User adjusts the maximum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: The user drags the right handle of the pay rate slider, changing the upper bound of the filter.

description: User scrolls down within the filter modal to see more options
frame_description: The content within the modal shifts upwards, revealing 'DEVICE' and 'ADVANCED OPTIONS' sections.

description: User reviews the device and advanced filter options
frame_description: The user pauses to look at the newly revealed filter options at the bottom of the modal.

description: User adjusts the minimum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: The user drags the left handle of the pay rate slider to increase the minimum pay requirement.

description: User adjusts the maximum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: The user fine-tunes the maximum pay rate by dragging the right slider handle.

description: User adjusts the maximum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: Another adjustment to the maximum pay rate slider handle.

description: User hovers over the duration filter options
frame_description: The cursor moves back up towards the duration buttons without clicking.

description: User adjusts the minimum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: The user drags the left handle of the pay rate slider again.

description: User adjusts the maximum pay rate using the slider
frame_description: A final adjustment to the right handle of the pay rate slider.

description: User clicks the chevron to expand the 'ADVANCED OPTIONS' section
frame_description: The user clicks the downward-facing arrow next to 'ADVANCED OPTIONS', expanding the section to show more filters.
